title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">🔹</font> Additional Assignments or Activit
content:
🔹 Additional Assignments or Activities (Only included when assigned in Canvas.)
🔹 Quiz (Only if a quiz is scheduled for the week.)

📌 2. Formatting Rules (Consistent for All Weeks)

Regardless of the number of sections, every week must follow this structure:

📌 2.1 Section Headers & Titles

Each section will be titled as follows:

✅ 📂 | [Week Number].[Section Number] | [Week Name] | [Section Name] | [Type]

Example:

### 📂 | 3.1 | Week 3 | Overview | Presentation

Type Markers:
• 📂 = General content section
• 🎯 = Learning Outcomes
• 📖 = Readings & Presentations
• 📝 = Assignments
• 💬 = Discussions
• 📊 = Quizzes
• ✅ = Knowledge Check
• 🔹 = Key topics & instructions
context: From document: ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols — chunk 3 (chunk 3/8)
